title: Glafira Zhur — Accessibility Expert
description: Personal minimalistic blog of Glafira Zhur. Accessibility expert from Bilbao. Documenting semantic web design, vanilla CSS, and digital inclusivity.

author.bio: Digital accessibility expert and front-end specialist from Bilbao. Passionate about semantic markup, vanilla web techniques, and ensuring the web is usable for everyone.
